'''rodadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hoarded|hoarded]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hoarded|hoarded]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rodadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rodadithi|rodadithi]] || [[word:rodadiji|rodadiji]] || [[word:rodadishi|rodadishi]] || [[word:rodadiki|rodadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rodaduthuthu|rodaduthuthu]] || [[word:rodadujuju|rodadujuju]] || [[word:rodadushushu|rodadushushu]] || [[word:rodadukuku|rodadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rodaduthu|rodaduthu]] || [[word:rodaduju|rodaduju]] || [[word:rodadushu|rodadushu]] || [[word:rodaduku|rodaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rodadufthuf|rodadufthuf]] || [[word:rodadufjuf|rodadufjuf]] || [[word:rodadufshuf|rodadufshuf]] || [[word:rodadufkuf|rodadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rodadethe|rodadethe]] || [[word:rodadeje|rodadeje]] || [[word:rodadeshe|rodadeshe]] || [[word:rodadeke|rodadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rodadothotho|rodadothotho]] || [[word:rodadojojo|rodadojojo]] || [[word:rodadoshosho|rodadoshosho]] || [[word:rodadokoko|rodadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rodadotho|rodadotho]] || [[word:rodadojo|rodadojo]] || [[word:rodadosho|rodadosho]] || [[word:rodadoko|rodadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rodadofthof|rodadofthof]] || [[word:rodadofjof|rodadofjof]] || [[word:rodadofshof|rodadofshof]] || [[word:rodadofkof|rodadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfthÃŸf|rodadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfjÃŸf|rodadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfshÃŸf|rodadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfkÃŸf|rodadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|rodadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|rodadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|rodadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|rodadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfthÃŸf|rodadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfjÃŸf|rodadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfshÃŸf|rodadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfkÃŸf|rodadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfthÃŸf|rodadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfjÃŸf|rodadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfshÃŸf|rodadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rodadÃŸfkÃŸf|rodadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rodadÃḊthÃḊ|rodadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:rodadÃḊjÃḊ|rodadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:rodadÃḊshÃḊ|rodadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:rodadÃḊkÃḊ|rodadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rodadathatha|rodadathatha]] || [[word:rodadajaja|rodadajaja]] || [[word:rodadashasha|rodadashasha]] || [[word:rodadakaka|rodadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rodadatha|rodadatha]] || [[word:rodadaja|rodadaja]] || [[word:rodadasha|rodadasha]] || [[word:rodadaka|rodadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rodadafthaf|rodadafthaf]] || [[word:rodadafjaf|rodadafjaf]] || [[word:rodadafshaf|rodadafshaf]] || [[word:rodadafkaf|rodadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rodadasha|rodadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rodadshÃḋsha|rodadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rodadrosha|rodadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rodadmusha|rodadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rodadyasha|rodadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorodadnkshÃḋsha|gorodadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorodadnkrosha|gorodadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorodadnkmusha|gorodadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorodadnkyasha|gorodadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rodadadasha|rodadadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rodadadshÃḋsha|rodadadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rodadadrosha|rodadadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rodadadmusha|rodadadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rodadadyasha|rodadadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorodadadnkshÃḋsha|gorodadadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorodadadnkrosha|gorodadadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorodadadnkmusha|gorodadadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorodadadnkyasha|gorodadadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:redÃḊdasha|redÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:redÃḊdshÃḋsha|redÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:redÃḊdrosha|redÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:redÃḊdmusha|redÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:redÃḊdyasha|redÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goredÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|goredÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goredÃḊdnkrosha|goredÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goredÃḊdnkmusha|goredÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goredÃḊdnkyasha|goredÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rodfadasha|rodfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rodfadshÃḋsha|rodfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rodfadrosha|rodfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rodfadmusha|rodfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rodfadyasha|rodfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorodfadnkshÃḋsha|gorodfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorodfadnkrosha|gorodfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorodfadnkmusha|gorodfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorodfadnkyasha|gorodfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
